items.title: Strengthen supporting context for aurora-watch
items.hypothesis: Aurora watch is still in review with no real views or impressions, so it needs stronger supporting context before expansion.
items.successMetric: The page earns first impressions, clicks, or stronger downstream engagement after supporting context is improved.
items.rollbackPlan: Keep the page in review and avoid further promotion if the supporting-context experiment stays weak.
items.notes: Leave queued for supervised follow-up until real traffic data is available.
